description: Ensure third-party vendor service provider contracts include cybersecurity requirements
Maintain and enforce network-based URL filters
Maintain a data classification scheme
Implement an Allowlist of authorized software
Subscribe to a threat detection & monitoring solution (e.g., MS-ISAC / Albert sensor)
Regularly perform automatic updates for enterprise-managed operating systems and applications
Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) for city email & file sharing
Set up full-disk encryption for laptops & city devices
Configure data access control lists on cloud storage and file shares (least-privilege access to data)
Secure and segment wireless networks (change default Wi-Fi credentials; separate guest from staff networks)
Establish an organizational AI acceptable-use policy
Implement anti-phishing filter (DMARC) for city email system
Ensure all organization-managed devices are configured securely (workstations, servers, printers, routers & other connected devices)
Maintain an isolated instance of recovery data, stored offline, or on an offsite system or service
Set up MFA & account-recovery hardening for city social media accounts - REQUIRED for every employee with access to a city social account
Set up a mobile device management (MDM) system to track city devices and remotely wipe them if lost or stolen
Require employees to follow an end-user acceptable-use & device-use agreement covering personal devices used for city work (e.g. password and security requirements)
Purchase a cyberinsurance policy
Develop a business continuity / continuity-of-operations (COOP) plan
Set up DDoS protection for the bond information website
Deploy and maintain anti-malware software on all organization-managed computers and devices
Implement role-based access control for organizational systems and accounts
Encrypt data on removable devices like USBs or external hard drives
Establish and maintain an incident response process
Require multi-factor authentication (MFA) for the Resident Engagement Database and the Capital Projects System
Establish and maintain a data management and secure disposal process for physical documents
Perform automated backups of enterprise assets on a regular basis
Conduct regular independent penetration testing / IT security audits on City software applications
Establish and maintain an audit log management process
